portfolioSlider.title: Our Real Projects
portfolioSlider.subtitle: Real work, real results — see what we've built

project1.title: Mulhim – E-Learning Platform
project1.description: We engineer world-class digital learning ecosystems that bridge the gap between education and technology. Key features include fully bilingual (AR/EN) content delivery, interactive video modules, enterprise-grade automated examination & grading systems, and real-time performance analytics for students and administrators.

project2.title: Harvest – Car Marketplace
project2.description: Our team delivers scalable, high-conversion mobile commerce solutions designed to dominate niche markets. This service includes integrated secure digital wallets, intelligent multi-parameter search algorithms, real-time inventory synchronization, and a seamless end-to-end encrypted transaction flow built with Flutter.

project3.title: MediSupport – Smart Booking & Clinic Management
project3.description: We specialize in developing sophisticated clinic reservation systems and medical management platforms. Our solution streamlines patient flows with an automated booking engine, real-time doctor availability calendars, SMS/WhatsApp appointment reminders, and digital patient queue management to ensure a zero-wait experience.

project4.title: Center Learning Management
project4.description: We streamline institutional operations with enterprise-grade management software that eliminates administrative bottlenecks. Features include automated attendance tracking, dynamic financial reporting, integrated parent-teacher portals, and comprehensive academic performance heatmaps.
